ddls:
CREATE TABLE "api_endpoints" (
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API endpoint */,
  "endpoint_name" TEXT /* Name of the API endpoint */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the API endpoint */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API endpoint */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the endpoint was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the endpoint was last modified */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who created or modified the endpoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API response */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API endpoint that generated the response */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Status code of the API response */,
  "response_header" TEXT /* Header of the API response */,
  "response_body" TEXT /* Body of the API response */,
  "response_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response format */,
  "error_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error code */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was generated */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_responses_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_codes" (
  "status_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status code */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Status code number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status code */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the status code was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the status code was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_headers" (
  "header_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response header */,
  "header_name" TEXT /* Name of the response header */,
  "header_value" TEXT /* Value of the response header */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response header */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the response header was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the response header was last modified */,
  "header_category" TEXT /* Category of the response header */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("header_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_headers_header_name FOREIGN KEY ("header_name") REFERENCES interaction_ids ("interaction_id_value")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_ids" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction ID */,
  "interaction_id_value" TEXT /* Value of the interaction ID */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction ID */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction ID was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction ID was last modified */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API request */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API endpoint that received the request */,
  "request_header" TEXT /* Header of the API request */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* Body of the API request */,
  "request_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request format */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_requests_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API request being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the access attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES api_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the response format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response format */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the response format was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the response format was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the API */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the API version was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the API version was last modified */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the API version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_versions_version_number FOREIGN KEY ("version_number") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("version")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_codes" (
  "error_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error code */,
  "error_code" INTEGER /* Error code number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error code */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the error code was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the error code was last modified */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_codes_error_code FOREIGN KEY ("error_code") REFERENCES api_responses ("status_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API endpoint being analyzed */,
  "request_count" INTEGER /* Number of requests made to the endpoint */,
  "response_count" INTEGER /* Number of responses returned by the endpoint */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Number of errors encountered by the endpoint */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics entry was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics entry was last modified */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period covered by the analytics entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)
